---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

## Improved Drinking Water Sources and Diarrheal Cases

This project examined the relationship between household drinking water sources and reported diarrheal cases using public health survey data from Ethiopia. I used R to clean the data, create descriptive tables, calculate measures of association, and conduct logistic regression analysis.

The goal of this project was to better understand whether access to improved drinking water sources was associated with lower reported diarrheal illness.

[View GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Sliu639)

---

## Public Health Data Visualization Project

This project focused on creating clear and accessible visualizations for communicating public health information to a general audience. I used R and ggplot2 to design charts that summarize differences in health-related measures across groups.

The goal of this project was to make public health data easier to understand through effective visual design and storytelling.

[View GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Sliu639)

---

## Applied Practice Experience: Medical Device Performance Summary

For my Applied Practice Experience, I summarized clinical and preclinical performance information for a medical insufflator. This work involved reviewing device-related information and organizing findings related to safety, effectiveness, and usability.

The goal of this project was to translate technical information into a clear summary that could support professional communication and decision-making.

[View Project Materials](https://github.com/Sliu639)
